positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized cosmic botanical wreath. The central subject features a luminous, crescent moon intertwined with abstracted flora elements (such as ethereal ferns and geometric blossoms) and interconnected constellations. The style must mimic a blend of Art Nouveau etching and modern psychedelic vector art, utilizing strong, thick outlines and solid, flat color blocking. The color palette should be limited to deep sapphire blue, burnt gold, dusty teal, and creamy beige. The composition must be centrally located, highly detailed, and designed for maximum visual impact on apparel, ensuring clean silhouettes and strong contrast.
